creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 226490
20210715-01-ports-comms-conserver-com.diff

I've locally updated conserver-com to 8.2.6 to gain IPv6 support.
I've not thoroughly tested the release though.

The new changes (patch files) have been upstreamed as pull request:
https://github.com/bstansell/conserver/pull/66

Changes to be committed:
  (use "git restore --staged <file>..." to unstage)
        modified:   Makefile
        modified:   distinfo
        deleted:    files/patch-conserver__group.c
        new file:   files/patch-conserver__main.c
        new file:   files/patch-conserver__readcfg.c
        deleted:    files/patch-cutil.c
